full_text:
Duan Wei (Zhongming) 段煨
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Duan Wei (段煨), styledZhongming, was born in Wuwei. Supplied Emperor Xian’s court despite being attacked. Destroyed Li Jue. Duan Wei was affiliated with Dong Zhuo, Yang Feng, and the Wei Kingdom. Duan Wei lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
